body.title: PROC_PLAN habit — reads ticket, stores plan, emits to basket
body.result: Added pe_plan() to pe_chain.py — tier.2 generates plan_summary+test_criterion; store_plan() called durably; fast path for ticket.plan. Seeded PROC_PLAN habit memory. 5 tests.
body.description: Seed PROC_PLAN cognitive habit: reads active ticket from basket context, calls store_plan, emits plan node into basket for PROC_FILTER to consume
